history.text: Kazakh Khanate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Kazakh ASSR placed the territory inside the Soviet administrative system.
Kazakh SSR placed the territory inside the Soviet administrative system.
Kazakhstan became independent from the Soviet Union, marking a key step in modern statehood.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Kazakhstan.

worthSeeing.title: Charyn Canyon:
worthSeeing.text: Dramatic red canyon often called Kazakhstan's Grand Canyon.

worthSeeing.title: Altai Mountains:
worthSeeing.text: Remote wilderness of glacial lakes, nomadic eagle hunters, and wild landscapes.

worthSeeing.title: Baikonur Cosmodrome:
worthSeeing.text: Historic Soviet space launch facility where Yuri Gagarin flew to space.
